---
title: "autocomplete.umd.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\docs\site_libs\quarto-search\autocomplete.umd.js"
loc: 1
complexity: 716
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 2.30
---

## Intent
The `autocomplete.umd.js` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on t, n, r, n, n, r, r, o, t, n, r, i, t, n, u, n, n, i, a, n, r, l, c, n, s, n, f, p, n, r, m, v, d, y, b, g, h, n, o, _, O, j, t, P, n, r, n, w, n, I, E, D, n, C, n, k, n, n, i, x, n, r, N, t, n, T, t, n, r, q, t, B, t, R, t, i, i, e, e, t, e, e, t, e, n, t, t, L, t, n, F, U, M, n, H, n, V, n, r, W, t, n, Q, t, n, r, K, t, G, t, t, t, t, e, t, n, c, t, n, t, o, t, t, t, J, e, X, Y, n, e, Z, ee, te, re, o, oe, n, r, ie, t, n, ue, t, n, r, ae, le, n, n, r, i, e, ce, n, se, n, u, fe, t, t, r, n, t, u, pe, me, ve, de, ye, n, r, be, t, n, r, ge, r, u, t, n, he, _e, n, r, Oe, t, n, Se, t, n, r, je, Pe, n, we, n, Ie, n, r, Ae, t, n, Ee, t, n, r, De, n, n, n, n, n, n, n, n, t, r, t, t, t, t, t, t, Ce, ke, n, r, xe, t, n, Ne, t, n, r, Te, qe, n, r, Be, t, n, Re, t, n, r, Le, n, Fe, n, Ue, Me, r, t, o, He, t, n, a, l, t, Ve, r, t, We, Qe, Ke, n, r, $e, t, n, ze, t, n, r, Ge, n, n, i, Je, t, tt, t, c, y, g, h, n, t, n, f, p, m, nt, rt, ot, n, r, it, t, n, ut, t, n, r, at, n, n, i, lt, ct, dt, n, r, yt, t, n, bt, t, n, r, gt, n, n, i, ht, t, n, u, n, n, i, u, n, u, i, u, a, l, n, i, t, u, e, e, n, l, c, n, i, t, u, a, _t, Ot, n, r, St, t, n, jt, t, n, r, Pt, t, wt, t, It, At, n, r, Et, t, n, Dt, t, n, r, Ct, n, r, kt, xt, n, r, Nt, t, n, Tt, t, n, r, qt, t, t, s, t, n, u, a, r, l, c, t, i, Bt, o, i, u, Lt, t, t, c, Ft, t, r, Ut, n, Mt, e, r, Ht, Vt, e, r, Wt, i, Qt, Kt, $t, zt, r, Gt, Jt, Xt, Yt, Zt, r, en, t, t, r, rn, t, t, o, T, on, dn, yn, t, bn, r, gn, i, hn, _n, On, n, Sn, t, jn, Pn, e, wn, s, In, r, An, u, En, t, Dn, Cn, i, kn, xn, Nn, c, Tn, qn, l, i, Bn, Rn, r, Ln, o, n, Fn, Mn, t, e, n, t, Hn, n, Vn, n, Wn, t, Qn, Gn, n, Jn, Xn, n, r, Yn, t, n, Zn, t, n, r, er, tr, n, nr, n, rr, t, or, ir, n, r, ur, t, n, ar, t, n, r, lr, cr, sr, n, r, fr, t, n, pr, t, n, r, mr, n, n, i, vr, n, dr, n, yr, t, r, r, br, t, r, r, gr, t, r, r, hr, t, r, r, _r, n, r, Pr, t, a, wr, Ar, n, r, t, n, i, t, t, r, Er, t, e, n, r, e, t, n, t, I, t, t, n, r, E, D, t, t, r, v, t, l, t, C, e, t, k, e, e, e, e, n, e, e, e, t, n, r, t. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via t, n, r, n, n, r, r, o, t, n, r, i, t, n, u, n, n, i, a, n, r, l, c, n, s, n, f, p, n, r, m, v, d, y, b, g, h, n, o, _, O, j, t, P, n, r, n, w, n, I, E, D, n, C, n, k, n, n, i, x, n, r, N, t, n, T, t, n, r, q, t, B, t, R, t, i, i, e, e, t, e, e, t, e, n, t, t, L, t, n, F, U, M, n, H, n, V, n, r, W, t, n, Q, t, n, r, K, t, G, t, t, t, t, e, t, n, c, t, n, t, o, t, t, t, J, e, X, Y, n, e, Z, ee, te, re, o, oe, n, r, ie, t, n, ue, t, n, r, ae, le, n, n, r, i, e, ce, n, se, n, u, fe, t, t, r, n, t, u, pe, me, ve, de, ye, n, r, be, t, n, r, ge, r, u, t, n, he, _e, n, r, Oe, t, n, Se, t, n, r, je, Pe, n, we, n, Ie, n, r, Ae, t, n, Ee, t, n, r, De, n, n, n, n, n, n, n, n, t, r, t, t, t, t, t, t, Ce, ke, n, r, xe, t, n, Ne, t, n, r, Te, qe, n, r, Be, t, n, Re, t, n, r, Le, n, Fe, n, Ue, Me, r, t, o, He, t, n, a, l, t, Ve, r, t, We, Qe, Ke, n, r, $e, t, n, ze, t, n, r, Ge, n, n, i, Je, t, tt, t, c, y, g, h, n, t, n, f, p, m, nt, rt, ot, n, r, it, t, n, ut, t, n, r, at, n, n, i, lt, ct, dt, n, r, yt, t, n, bt, t, n, r, gt, n, n, i, ht, t, n, u, n, n, i, u, n, u, i, u, a, l, n, i, t, u, e, e, n, l, c, n, i, t, u, a, _t, Ot, n, r, St, t, n, jt, t, n, r, Pt, t, wt, t, It, At, n, r, Et, t, n, Dt, t, n, r, Ct, n, r, kt, xt, n, r, Nt, t, n, Tt, t, n, r, qt, t, t, s, t, n, u, a, r, l, c, t, i, Bt, o, i, u, Lt, t, t, c, Ft, t, r, Ut, n, Mt, e, r, Ht, Vt, e, r, Wt, i, Qt, Kt, $t, zt, r, Gt, Jt, Xt, Yt, Zt, r, en, t, t, r, rn, t, t, o, T, on, dn, yn, t, bn, r, gn, i, hn, _n, On, n, Sn, t, jn, Pn, e, wn, s, In, r, An, u, En, t, Dn, Cn, i, kn, xn, Nn, c, Tn, qn, l, i, Bn, Rn, r, Ln, o, n, Fn, Mn, t, e, n, t, Hn, n, Vn, n, Wn, t, Qn, Gn, n, Jn, Xn, n, r, Yn, t, n, Zn, t, n, r, er, tr, n, nr, n, rr, t, or, ir, n, r, ur, t, n, ar, t, n, r, lr, cr, sr, n, r, fr, t, n, pr, t, n, r, mr, n, n, i, vr, n, dr, n, yr, t, r, r, br, t, r, r, gr, t, r, r, hr, t, r, r, _r, n, r, Pr, t, a, wr, Ar, n, r, t, n, i, t, t, r, Er, t, e, n, r, e, t, n, t, I, t, t, n, r, E, D, t, t, r, v, t, l, t, C, e, t, k, e, e, e, e, n, e, e, e, t, n, r, t. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `n`
- `n`
- `r`
- `r`
- `o`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `i`
- `t`
- `n`
- `u`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `a`
- `n`
- `r`
- `l`
- `c`
- `n`
- `s`
- `n`
- `f`
- `p`
- `n`
- `r`
- `m`
- `v`
- `d`
- `y`
- `b`
- `g`
- `h`
- `n`
- `o`
- `_`
- `O`
- `j`
- `t`
- `P`
- `n`
- `r`
- `n`
- `w`
- `n`
- `I`
- `E`
- `D`
- `n`
- `C`
- `n`
- `k`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `x`
- `n`
- `r`
- `N`
- `t`
- `n`
- `T`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `q`
- `t`
- `B`
- `t`
- `R`
- `t`
- `i`
- `i`
- `e`
- `e`
- `t`
- `e`
- `e`
- `t`
- `e`
- `n`
- `t`
- `t`
- `L`
- `t`
- `n`
- `F`
- `U`
- `M`
- `n`
- `H`
- `n`
- `V`
- `n`
- `r`
- `W`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Q`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `K`
- `t`
- `G`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `e`
- `t`
- `n`
- `c`
- `t`
- `n`
- `t`
- `o`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `J`
- `e`
- `X`
- `Y`
- `n`
- `e`
- `Z`
- `ee`
- `te`
- `re`
- `o`
- `oe`
- `n`
- `r`
- `ie`
- `t`
- `n`
- `ue`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `ae`
- `le`
- `n`
- `n`
- `r`
- `i`
- `e`
- `ce`
- `n`
- `se`
- `n`
- `u`
- `fe`
- `t`
- `t`
- `r`
- `n`
- `t`
- `u`
- `pe`
- `me`
- `ve`
- `de`
- `ye`
- `n`
- `r`
- `be`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `ge`
- `r`
- `u`
- `t`
- `n`
- `he`
- `_e`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Oe`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Se`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `je`
- `Pe`
- `n`
- `we`
- `n`
- `Ie`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Ae`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Ee`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `De`
- `n`
- `n`
- `n`
- `n`
- `n`
- `n`
- `n`
- `n`
- `t`
- `r`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `t`
- `Ce`
- `ke`
- `n`
- `r`
- `xe`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Ne`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Te`
- `qe`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Be`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Re`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Le`
- `n`
- `Fe`
- `n`
- `Ue`
- `Me`
- `r`
- `t`
- `o`
- `He`
- `t`
- `n`
- `a`
- `l`
- `t`
- `Ve`
- `r`
- `t`
- `We`
- `Qe`
- `Ke`
- `n`
- `r`
- `$e`
- `t`
- `n`
- `ze`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Ge`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `Je`
- `t`
- `tt`
- `t`
- `c`
- `y`
- `g`
- `h`
- `n`
- `t`
- `n`
- `f`
- `p`
- `m`
- `nt`
- `rt`
- `ot`
- `n`
- `r`
- `it`
- `t`
- `n`
- `ut`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `at`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `lt`
- `ct`
- `dt`
- `n`
- `r`
- `yt`
- `t`
- `n`
- `bt`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `gt`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `ht`
- `t`
- `n`
- `u`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `u`
- `n`
- `u`
- `i`
- `u`
- `a`
- `l`
- `n`
- `i`
- `t`
- `u`
- `e`
- `e`
- `n`
- `l`
- `c`
- `n`
- `i`
- `t`
- `u`
- `a`
- `_t`
- `Ot`
- `n`
- `r`
- `St`
- `t`
- `n`
- `jt`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Pt`
- `t`
- `wt`
- `t`
- `It`
- `At`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Et`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Dt`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Ct`
- `n`
- `r`
- `kt`
- `xt`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Nt`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Tt`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `qt`
- `t`
- `t`
- `s`
- `t`
- `n`
- `u`
- `a`
- `r`
- `l`
- `c`
- `t`
- `i`
- `Bt`
- `o`
- `i`
- `u`
- `Lt`
- `t`
- `t`
- `c`
- `Ft`
- `t`
- `r`
- `Ut`
- `n`
- `Mt`
- `e`
- `r`
- `Ht`
- `Vt`
- `e`
- `r`
- `Wt`
- `i`
- `Qt`
- `Kt`
- `$t`
- `zt`
- `r`
- `Gt`
- `Jt`
- `Xt`
- `Yt`
- `Zt`
- `r`
- `en`
- `t`
- `t`
- `r`
- `rn`
- `t`
- `t`
- `o`
- `T`
- `on`
- `dn`
- `yn`
- `t`
- `bn`
- `r`
- `gn`
- `i`
- `hn`
- `_n`
- `On`
- `n`
- `Sn`
- `t`
- `jn`
- `Pn`
- `e`
- `wn`
- `s`
- `In`
- `r`
- `An`
- `u`
- `En`
- `t`
- `Dn`
- `Cn`
- `i`
- `kn`
- `xn`
- `Nn`
- `c`
- `Tn`
- `qn`
- `l`
- `i`
- `Bn`
- `Rn`
- `r`
- `Ln`
- `o`
- `n`
- `Fn`
- `Mn`
- `t`
- `e`
- `n`
- `t`
- `Hn`
- `n`
- `Vn`
- `n`
- `Wn`
- `t`
- `Qn`
- `Gn`
- `n`
- `Jn`
- `Xn`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Yn`
- `t`
- `n`
- `Zn`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `er`
- `tr`
- `n`
- `nr`
- `n`
- `rr`
- `t`
- `or`
- `ir`
- `n`
- `r`
- `ur`
- `t`
- `n`
- `ar`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `lr`
- `cr`
- `sr`
- `n`
- `r`
- `fr`
- `t`
- `n`
- `pr`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `mr`
- `n`
- `n`
- `i`
- `vr`
- `n`
- `dr`
- `n`
- `yr`
- `t`
- `r`
- `r`
- `br`
- `t`
- `r`
- `r`
- `gr`
- `t`
- `r`
- `r`
- `hr`
- `t`
- `r`
- `r`
- `_r`
- `n`
- `r`
- `Pr`
- `t`
- `a`
- `wr`
- `Ar`
- `n`
- `r`
- `t`
- `n`
- `i`
- `t`
- `t`
- `r`
- `Er`
- `t`
- `e`
- `n`
- `r`
- `e`
- `t`
- `n`
- `t`
- `I`
- `t`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `E`
- `D`
- `t`
- `t`
- `r`
- `v`
- `t`
- `l`
- `t`
- `C`
- `e`
- `t`
- `k`
- `e`
- `e`
- `e`
- `e`
- `n`
- `e`
- `e`
- `e`
- `t`
- `n`
- `r`
- `t`
